thinkpad_database.addons: It has been called ThinkPad X12 Gen 1 in China, and NEC VersaPro タイプVS<VS-9> is based on it

memory.type: LPDDR4X-3733 For 4GB Model, LPDDR4X-4266 For 8GB/16GB Model
memory.slots: Memory soldered to systemboard, no slots, Single-Channel For 4GB Model, Dual-Channel For 8GB/16GB Model
memory.features: Dual-channel capable, Single-Channel For 4GB Model, Dual-Channel For 8GB/16GB Model

storage.ssd_pcie: M.2 2242 SSD / PCIe NVMe, PCIe 3.0 x4, up to 1TB

Bluetooth.form: Integrated in Wi-Fi + Bluetooth combo adapter

SIM_Card.type: Gemalto eSIM card (physical) or no physical SIM card

ports: 1 x USB-C  (USB 10Gbps, with PD 3.0 and DP 2.1)
1 x Thunderbolt 4 (with USB PD 3.1 and DP 2.1)
camera: Front 5.0MP + IR discrete with privacy shutter
audio: HD Audio, Realtek® ALC3306-CG codec / Stereo speakers, 1W x2, Dolby Audio™ / Dual-microphone array, Dolby Voice®
keyboard: ThinkPad® X12 Detachable Folio Keyboard, 6-row, spill-resistant, multimedia Fn keys, 1.35mm travel, Copilot key, LED backlight, Fingerprint reader
TrackPoint pointing device, double-tap Quick Menu, glass-like Mylar trackpad

physical.dimensions: Tablet: 283.3 x 203.5 x 8.8 mm, Folio keyboard: 283.3 x 217.8 x 5.7 mm, Total: 283.3 x 208.1 x 14.5 mm
physical.weight: Tablet: 0.76 kg, Folio keyboard: 0.34 kg, Total: 1.1 kg
